nasb.text: How great are His signs And how mighty are His wonders! His kingdom is an everlasting kingdom And His dominion is from generation to generation.

esv.text: How great are his signs, how mighty his wonders! His kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and his dominion endures from generation to generation.

cnv.text: 他的神蹟多麼偉大， 他的奇事多麼有力； 他的國是永遠的國，

ccb.text: “祂的神迹何其伟大！ 祂的奇事何其可畏！ 祂的国度永远长存， 祂的统治直到万代。
